inputs.label: Lawn Area
inputs.businessContext: Total area of the lawn to be fertilized

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area of the lawn to be fertilized
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale de la pelouse à fertiliser
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total del césped a fertilizar

inputs.label: Nitrogen Content (N%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of nitrogen by weight in the fertilizer product (N-P-K first number)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of nitrogen by weight in the fertilizer product (N-P-K first number)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gübre ürünündeki ağırlıkça azot yüzdesi (N-P-K ilk sayı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichtsprozent Stickstoff im Düngerprodukt (N-P-K erste Zahl)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'azote en poids dans le produit fertilisant (premier nombre N-P-K)
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de nitrógeno en peso en el producto fertilizante (primer número N-P-K)

inputs.label: Desired Nitrogen Rate
inputs.businessContext: Target application rate of pure nitrogen per square meter per application

businessContext_i18n.en: Target application rate of pure nitrogen per square meter per application
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulama başına metrekare başına hedeflenen saf azot miktarı
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielausbringungsmenge reinen Stickstoffs pro Quadratmeter pro Anwendung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'application cible d'azote pur par mètre carré par application
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de aplicación objetivo de nitrógeno puro por metro cuadrado por aplicación

inputs.label: Applications per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of fertilizer applications planned per year

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of fertilizer applications planned per year
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'applications d'engrais prévues par an
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de aplicaciones de fertilizante planificadas por año

inputs.label: Bag Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of a single fertilizer bag

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of a single fertilizer bag
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso de un saco de fertilizante

inputs.label: Cost per Bag
inputs.businessContext: Purchase cost of one fertilizer bag (optional, set to 0 for no cost calculation)

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase cost of one fertilizer bag (optional, set to 0 for no cost calculation)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir gübre torbasının satın alma maliyeti (isteğe bağlı, maliyet hesaplanmayacaksa 0 girin)
businessContext_i18n.de: Kaufpreis eines Düngersacks (optional, auf 0 setzen für keine Kostenberechnung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'achat d'un sac d'engrais (optionnel, mettre 0 pour ignorer le calcul de coût)
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de compra de un saco de fertilizante (opcional, establecer en 0 si no se calcula el coste)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
